explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.findings: The company highlights its compliance with US FAA regulations. This compliance demonstrates a commitment to external oversight.
external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Publish third-party audit results, certifications, or regulatory compliance documentation.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Percepto Delek US Case Study" provides evidence for **governance** and **external accountability**. This case study details the deployment of AI-powered autonomous drones for routine inspections, highlighting the company's adherence to "governance goals" and "compliance with US FAA regulations," which demonstrates a commitment to established policies and external oversight.
relevant_sources.title: Percepto Delek US Case Study

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: The company highlights its adherence to governance goals and compliance with US FAA regulations. The use of an AI-powered drone solution supports compliance with environmental and safety regulations.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The "Percepto Delek US Case Study" provides evidence for **governance** and **external accountability**. This case study details the deployment of AI-powered autonomous drones for routine inspections, highlighting the company's adherence to "governance goals" and "compliance with US FAA regulations," which demonstrates a commitment to established policies and external oversight.
relevant_sources.title: Percepto Delek US Case Study

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights Delek US's use of Percepto's AI-powered drone solution for refinery inspections and monitoring, which supports compliance with environmental and safety regulations, implying oversight and accountability. The description of the AI system's capabilities in visual data management and analysis, including automated workflows and insights, demonstrates transparency in how AI is being utilized.
relevant_sources.title: Delek US Gains First BVLOS Approval for U.S. Refineries Using Percepto Drone and AI Solution

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: The company describes the capabilities of its AI system, including visual data management, analysis, automated workflows, and insights. This description demonstrates how AI is being utilized.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: This press release provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars of responsible AI. It highlights Delek US's use of Percepto's AI-powered drone solution for refinery inspections and monitoring, which supports compliance with environmental and safety regulations, implying oversight and accountability. The description of the AI system's capabilities in visual data management and analysis, including automated workflows and insights, demonstrates transparency in how AI is being utilized.
relevant_sources.title: Delek US Gains First BVLOS Approval for U.S. Refineries Using Percepto Drone and AI Solution

summary.overall_findings: Based on 6 publicly available sources, Delek US Holdings' published materials address 3 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Transparency disclosures describe the AI system's capabilities in visual data management and analysis, as well as automated workflows and insights. Additionally, governance and external accountability materials highlight compliance with US FAA regulations, demonstrating a commitment to external oversight. No qualifying public evidence was found for fairness, explainability, and 2 additional pillars.
